mapper.select: SELECT id FROM users WHERE supabase_uid = #{supabaseUid}::uuid
SELECT id FROM users WHERE uuid = #{uuid}::uuid AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id FROM users WHERE friend_code = upper(#{friendCode}) AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS( SELECT 1 FROM users WHERE lower(email) = lower(#{email}) AND deleted_at IS NULL )
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO users (supabase_uid, nickname, email, profile_image_url, friend_code) VALUES (#{supabaseUid}::uuid, #{nickname}, #{email}, #{profileImageUrl}, #{friendCode}) ON CONFLICT (supabase_uid) DO NOTHING
mapper.select: SELECT uuid::text AS uuid, nickname, email, profile_image_url, bio, friend_code FROM users WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE users SET nickname = #{nickname}, bio = #{bio}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE users SET profile_image_url = #{profileImageUrl}, updated_at = now() WHERE id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
